headline: Bridgewater Associates Is Trading the Software Apocalypse as It Sells Workday, Salesforce, Other Key SaaS Stocks
summary: Bridgewater’s massive exit from top SaaS stocks is fueling fears that AI could upend the traditional software business model and reshape the next era of tech investing.
